title: ANC - 4.-ANC is ON and its value is either Adaptive or Standard and User doesn’t change value during call when Transparency is OFF without selected values
scenario: ANC remains ON and Transparency OFF during a call, with Transparency greyed out and inaccessible, and normal toggle resumes after the call ends.
steps: Set ANC to Adaptive or Standard (ON).
Ensure Transparency Mode is OFF with no value selected.
Attempt to change the ANC value during the call.
Tap on Transparency Mode during the call.
Check the state of ANC and Transparency after the call ends.
Attempt to toggle between ANC and Transparency modes.
expected: During the call, the user should not be able to change the ANC value. Transparency Mode should be greyed out and inaccessible; tapping it shows a popup stating the option is unavailable. After the call ends, ANC remains ON with the previously selected value, Transparency stays OFF with no value selected, and the user can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally.
